---
title: "cache_bro.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\local\CacheBro\cache_bro.py"
loc: 78
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.52
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 3.45
overall_score: 2.58
---

## Intent
The `cache_bro.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on CacheBro, __init__, _load_cache, _save_cache, _get_hash, read_file, reset. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CacheBro, __init__, _load_cache, _save_cache, _get_hash, read_file, reset. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [difflib](file://difflib)
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `CacheBro`
- `__init__`
- `_load_cache`
- `_save_cache`
- `_get_hash`
- `read_file`
- `reset`
